feed.title: SAP Community - SAP NetWeaver
feed.subtitle: SAP NetWeaver Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Error : Could Not Determine mapping steps for message in SAP PO
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

I have a IDOC -> PI -> SFTP   scenario that I have implemented with an ICO (I'm using PI 7.50).

while testing i am getting the following error.

Transmitting the message to endpoint <local> using connection AFW failed, due to: com.sap.engine.interfaces.messaging.api.exception.MessagingException: Error encountered while executing mapping: com.sap.aii.af.service.mapping.MappingException: com.sap.aii.utilxi.misc.api.ResourceException: Could not determine mapping steps for message 7e24f305-1f9e-11f0-c2e8-00000c37e086

But it works fine in production not in consolidate system.

please check the message logs of particular message

Please help .

Regards,

Ravi

entry.title: Issue testing RFC connection EU_SCRP_WN32 in DEV/QAS (timeout during allocate)
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I’m facing an issue when trying to test the RFC connection EU_SCRP_WN32 in the DEV and QAS environments.

When running the connection test, I get the following error:

Interestingly, the same RFC works normally in PRD.

I have already checked the RFC configurations in DEV, QAS, and PRD, and they are identical.

Has anyone faced a similar issue or could provide some guidance on what else I could check?
Could it be something on the local workstation, the Gateway, or some specific configuration in DEV/QAS environments?

Any help would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: SAP HR connection issue
entry.content:
We are facing an issue connecting to AD server from SAP System

The server details are maintained correctly and connection check is also successfully (please refer attached document ->snapshot#6)

However, while calling the Function module LDAP_CREATE and passing the values, we are getting “Object class violation” error message

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Certification status of the HPE MSA 2070 storage system for use with SAP ERP 6.0
entry.content:
I am reaching out to request official information regarding the compatibility and certification status of the HPE MSA 2070 storage system for use with SAP ERP 6.0 Enhancement Package 5 (EHP5) running on a Microsoft SQL Server database.

 

We have reviewed the SAP HANA certified hardware catalog, but it appears to focus primarily on SAP HANA rather than traditional databases like MS SQL.HPE documentation mentions support for SAP HANA with similar MSA models, but there is no clear reference to SAP ERP on MS SQL.

 

 

 

To assist us in making an informed decision, could you please provide clarification on the following points:

  1. Is the HPE MSA 2070 storage system certified for use with SAP ERP 6.0 EHP5 on MS SQL?
  2. If certified, could you kindly provide a link to the official documentation or certification page where this is detailed?
  3. If not certified, can you recommend alternative HPE storage systems that are officially certified for this configuration?
  4. Are there any specific configuration requirements or recommendations for HPE storage systems when used with SAP ERP on MS SQL?

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Program RSXMB_DELETE_MESSAGES issue to delete SAP PO tables, deleting almost none
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am using Program RSXMB_DELETE_MESSAGES to delete SAP PO tables in ECC. Goal is to delete all the records from tables SXMSCLUR, SXMSCLUP except for the last 1 month (retention period). We never achieved or deleted any records and currently have around 214 millions of records in these tables. 

The program above RSXMB_DELETE_MESSAGES worked fine in QA system and deleted the records in 5 days but when I ran this program in Production system, it was deleting only 100 records every ~45min which won't help due to the amount of data we have in those tables and how much we process every day.

Below is the screen shot of the job with parameters and the records deleted every loop. 

Can you please help me understand why it is deleting only 100 records every loop(commit) and how it can be increased to 100K or more every commit/loop. FYI, I checked the parameters between my QA and Production systems and they all are same. Appreciate your help. Thanks.

entry.title: How to remove pacemaker without impacting Application and collab ASCS and ERS in single server
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

 

 

We are upgrading our operating system from Redhat 7.4 to 8.10 and we need to remove the pacemaker (cluster) between these 2 servers . 

 

server01 ASCS

server02 ERS

 

Please be informed that we dont need pacemaker cluster anymore after RH upgrade, we need to run ASCS standalone. Kindly suggest on below -

 

Question 1 - How we can remove the cluster configuration like resource agents, resource groups etc. without impacting the SAP application.

 

Question 2 - Do we run to maintain both servers after removing the cluster config, as we need to run the application with standalon ASCS.

 

Regards,

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Automatically export / save update errors and short dumps
entry.content:
Hi,

As auditors keep an eye on missing document numbers, we have to explain these.

We found out they often come from update errors in SM13 (with corresponding short dumps in ST22).

For documentation and analysis we need to be able to access these historically.
As short dumps are reorganized regularly and update errors should be deleted before updates we need another solution.

Is there a way to automatically export update errors and (corresponding) short dumps?

Thank you for feedback & Best regards,

Jonas

entry.title: How to identify vulnerabilities according to our SAP versions
entry.content:
Hi

We need to identify what Vulnerabilities are known for the systems we have in our landscape, we would also need to validate what SP is the minimum required to remediate them as well, so we can start working on this SP implementation.

Is there any tool or way to do this?

Thanks and regards!

entry.title: Database level audit requirements
entry.content:
Dear Team,


We have enabled database level auditing for our MSSQL database for INSERT, UPDATE & DELETE queries for all database users.


We are having following further requirements on the auditing part

  1. We need change log/history of all audit trails including old and new values.
  2. We want to activate individual table level database auditing.
  3. We are unable to read generated database audit files. How to read the data captured in these audit files.

Expecting your inputs to achieve the mentioned settings in audit policies.


Thanks,


SAP BASIS Team


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Unable to Download License file for SAP NetWeaver AS ABAP Developer Edition 7.52 SP04
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm currently trying to set up SAP NetWeaver AS ABAP Developer Edition 7.52 SP04, but I'm facing an issue with downloading the license file. Specifically, I am unable to download the file named "SAP ABAP AS Part License", which is required to complete the installation process.
Each time I try to access the license file, the download either fails. I've checked multiple browsers and internet connections, but the issue persists.

Is anyone else experiencing the same problem, or is there an alternative link or solution to obtain the license file?

entry.title: Need confirmation for OS upgrade
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

We are currently planning an operating system upgrade from SUSE Linux Enterprise Server (SLES) 15 SP5 to SLES 15 SP6

  • Please let us know if the PO systems (Netweaver 7.5 SP29) and solution manager(7.2 SP14) version support the Linux version or not. 
  • Please suggest exactly where and what all we need to check for the compatibility

Regards,

Bhushan

entry.title: Interface Register
entry.content:
Hi,

There is a requirement to maintain an excel sheet having details of deployed artifacts on SAP PO and cloud integration system SAP IS.

Is there any tool/API or automated way to sync the excel sheet data with deployed artifacts.

Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Is there any impact upgrading SAP GUI to 8.00 release 32-bit SAP Logon on 64-bit Windows computer?
entry.content:
Hi Dear SAP,

I have a question: What would happen if I installed 32-bit SAP Logon on my 64-bit computer?

Currently, I have 32-bit SAP Logon 770 installed. To upgrade to SAP Logon 800, I can see SAP have 32-bit and 64-bit versions.

If we upgrade to SAP Logon 800, will there be any impact?

 

Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: What SAP roles are required for an user to access /sap/xi/engine from CPI
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have been migration our PO interfaces to CPI and we are using Basic authentication to connect with SAP systems.

While migrating proxy interfaces we are facing Authorization issues. The user we are using for all other communications is giving error '401- Unauthorized' when tried to access /sap/xi/engine.

What roles are required here? what options are available?

entry.title: System copy using SWPM Refresh or Move Database Instance(Online DB backup)
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are performing System copy using SWPM Refresh or Move Database Instance(Online Production DB backup). SWPM got struck due to Online DB backup not available in a backup location. so i have stopped the SWPM.

I have triggered SWPM again to continue with new run but error received in SWPM. Can you please advise how to fix the issue?

Log: instdir/HdbCmdOut.log

Sat Jun 14 11:11:45 CEST 2025 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.connection.sql.JdbcConnection | Start new connection with connect URL: jdbc:sap://xxxxhostname:30013/?databaseName=PQ2 connect user: SYSTEM
Sat Jun 14 11:11:47 CEST 2025 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.utils.cmd.clazz.IsConnectPossible | HDBSLLIB Exception: [CONNECTION_REFUSED] com.sap.db.jdbc.exceptions.JDBCDriverException: SAP DBTech JDBC: Cannot connect to jdbc:sap://xxxxhostname:30013/ [Cannot connect to host /10.10.10.108:30015 [java.io.IOException: The remote computer refused the network connection.
], -813.: (uninitialized) -> 10.10.10.108:30015 ConnectionID:0 SessionID:0].
Sat Jun 14 11:11:47 CEST 2025 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | End of HdbCmdClazz section: class com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.utils.cmd.clazz.IsConnectPossible
Sat Jun 14 11:11:47 CEST 2025 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | *************************************************************

R3trans -d result:

4 ETW000 unicode enabled version

entry.title: Maintenance Planner not working
entry.content: Maintenance planner won"t launch

entry.title: Time Zone Change Impact on Timestamp Storage
entry.content:
Hello SAP Support Team,
We are planning to update all our Linux/Unix application servers by using UTC time zone instead of EDT/EST


  • If data was stored in the database while the servers were set to EDT/EST, how will this information be displayed or interpreted after the servers are switched to UTC?
  • When SAP stores timestamped information in the database, does it use the application server’s local time, UTC, or another standard?
  • Are there any additional considerations we should be aware of?

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: 在采购预制发票过账时(MIRO)出现过账完成财务凭证已生成 但发票状态还是预制状态 并且还能继续过账
entry.content: 有几张采购预制发票出现了特殊情况 采购预制发票界面 点击过账  过账成功生成了财务凭证 但是预制发票仍然是可修改的状态 查询后台表RBKP 发现预制发票的状态仍然是预制状态并未变成已过账状态 并且还能继续点击过账按钮 继续生成凭证 重复生成的凭证影响到了财务报表的生成 且重复生成的凭证凭证信息有缺失

entry.title: GRC QA cannot startup after DB Refresh
entry.content:

4 ETW000 unicode enabled version
4 ETW000 ===============================================

entry.title: Is there a way to prevent a user from entering the same transaction more than twice?
entry.content:
Dear community

Is there a way to prevent a user from entering the same transaction more than twice?

Thank you for your help.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
